stemHtml: On final approach, your aircraft encounters a hydraulic failure on the system which powers the brakes. How does the pilot pressurise the brake accumulator to ensure braking capability?

options.a: By using a dedicated switch in the cockpit.
options.b: The pilot has to pump a lever in the cockpit a certain number of times.
options.c: The pilot has to press hard on the brakes upon landing.
options.d: Nothing needs to be done as the accumulator is automatically pressurised when engines are running.
